market_pulse: EDC Week momentum peaks across Strip venues with David Guetta, Tiësto, and Calvin Harris anchoring lineups; LIV Beach gains John Summit social traction while competitors scale ultra-premium talent.

weekend_readiness.label: PEAK
factors: Encore, OMNIA, Zouk, LIV all hosting A-list DJs tonight (5/16)
Saturday peak demand across all major venues
Potential capacity constraints across pool/beach clubs
weekend_readiness.liv_recommendation: Activate all VIP tables. Monitor real-time availability. Deploy street team for live bookings. Peak pricing active 10pm-4am.

content_gaps.description: Competitors heavily promoting up-and-coming deep house/tech-house artists (Westend, Mathame, Cristoph). LIV social silent on emerging artist discovery content.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Produce 3-5 TikTok series 'Artist to Watch' featuring LIV Beach resident/guest emerging talents with studio/prep content.

content_gaps.description: TikTok dress code + outfit guides dominating search results for competitors (Hakkasan, OMNIA, Encore all showing strong UGC). LIV minimal presence.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Launch UGC campaign: '#LIVfit Fridays' — repost guest outfit content with bonus entry for LIV swag/upgrade raffle.

content_gaps.description: OMNIA Dayclub running consistent countdown/teaser Stories 5+ days before events. LIV Beach Stories sporadic.
content_gaps.suggested_action: Implement 5-day Story countdown template: Day 5 (talent reveal) → Day 3 (hype) → Day 1 (final push) → Day 0 (live feed).
